controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - credit information reporting) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks
- Credit Information Reporting) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - credit information reporting) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect, unless otherwise
specified.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to commercial banks [hereinafter collectively referred to as 'credit institutions (cis)' and individually referred to as 'credit institu
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Commercial Banks [hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'Credit Institutions (CIs)' and individually referred to as
'Credit Institution (CI)'].
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to commercial banks [hereinafter collectively referred to as 'credit institutions (cis)' and individually referred to as 'credit institu

controls.control_objective: To ensure banking companies (other than small finance banks, payment banks, and local area banks), corresponding new banks, and the state bank of india, as defi
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of these Directions, 'Commercial Banks' means banking
companies (other than Small Finance Banks, Payment Banks, and Local Area
Banks), corresponding new banks, and the State Bank of India, as defined
respectively under clauses (c), (da), and (nc) of Section 5 of the Banking
Regulation Act, 1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to banking companies (other than small finance banks, payment banks, and local area banks), corresponding new banks, and the state bank of india, as defi

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meaning assigned to them below: (1) 'company' means a company defined under section 3 of the companies act, 1956 or corresponding section und
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall
bear the meaning assigned to them below:
(1) 'Company' means a company defined under section 3 of the Companies Act,
1956 or corresponding section under the Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meaning assigned to them below: (1) 'company' means a company defined under section 3 of the companies act, 1956 or corresponding section und

controls.control_objective: To ensure companies that have been <image> granted a certificate of registration under section 5 of the cicra
controls.control_description:
(2) 'Credit Information Companies (CICs)' means companies that have been
<image>
granted a certificate of registration under section 5 of the CICRA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to companies that have been <image> granted a certificate of registration under section 5 of the cicra

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning assigned to it under clause
controls.control_description:
TransUnion CIBIL Limited March 05, 2012
(3) 'Specified User (SU)' shall have the same meaning assigned to it under clause
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning assigned to it under clause

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meanings as assigned to them in these statute/ rules/ regulations
controls.control_description:
Words or expressions used in these Directions and not defined herein, but defined
in CICRA, 2005, the Credit Information Companies Rules, 2006 (hereinafter
referred to as 'CIC Rules') and the CIC Regulations, shall have the same
meanings as assigned to them in these Statute/ Rules/ Regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meanings as assigned to them in these statute/ rules/ regulations

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meanings as assigned to them in these acts
controls.control_description:
Any other
words or expressions used and not defined in these directions or aforesaid
Statute/ Rules/ Regulations and defined in Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or
Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Companies Act, 2013 shall have the same
meanings as assigned to them in these Acts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meanings as assigned to them in these acts

controls.control_objective: To ensure become member of all the cics registered with the rbi
controls.control_description: A CI shall become member of all the CICs registered with the RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to become member of all the cics registered with the rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed ₹10,000 each
controls.control_description:
One-time membership fee charged by the CICs from a CI to become their
members shall not exceed ₹10,000 each.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed ₹10,000 each

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed ₹5,000 each
controls.control_description: The annual fees charged by the CICs from a CI shall not exceed ₹5,000 each.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed ₹5,000 each

controls.control_objective: To ensure be undertaken in standardised data formats as prescribed in annex i
controls.control_description:
The reporting of credit information by a CI to the CICs, shall be undertaken in
standardised data formats as prescribed in Annex I.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be undertaken in standardised data formats as prescribed in annex i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be known as 'uniform credit reporting format' (ucrf) as denoted below: (1) form 1: uniform credit reporting format (consumer) - for consumer segment
controls.control_description:
These standardised data
formats would be a non-proprietary reporting format and shall be known as
'Uniform Credit Reporting Format' (UCRF) as denoted below:
(1) Form 1: Uniform Credit Reporting Format (Consumer) - for consumer segment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be known as 'uniform credit reporting format' (ucrf) as denoted below: (1) form 1: uniform credit reporting format (consumer) - for consumer segment

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to following guidelines on reporting timelines and updation: (1) a ci shall submit data on credit information of its borrowers (including histo
controls.control_description:
A CI shall adhere to following guidelines on reporting timelines and updation:
(1) A CI shall submit data on credit information of its borrowers (including historical
data) to all CICs.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to adhere to following guidelines on reporting timelines and updation: (1) a ci shall submit data on credit information of its borrowers (including histo

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep the credit information collected / maintained by it, updated regularly on the following basis or at shorter intervals as mutually agreed upon bet
controls.control_description:
(2) 1A CI shall keep the credit information collected / maintained by it, updated
regularly on the following basis or at shorter intervals as mutually agreed upon
between the CI and CIC:
Explanation: Accounts with change only in days past due from the last reporting
reference date shall also form part of the reporting.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep the credit information collected / maintained by it, updated regularly on the following basis or at shorter intervals as mutually agreed upon bet

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit credit information as on 9th, 16th, 23rd and last day of the month (hereinafter referred to as the reference dates) to cics
controls.control_description:
(i) A CI shall submit credit information as on 9th, 16th, 23rd and last day of the month
(hereinafter referred to as the reference dates) to CICs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit credit information as on 9th, 16th, 23rd and last day of the month (hereinafter referred to as the reference dates) to cics

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit the full file containing credit information records as on the last day of the month to the cics, by 5th day of the next month
controls.control_description:
(ii) A CI shall submit the full file containing credit information records as on the last
day of the month to the CICs, by 5th day of the next month.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit the full file containing credit information records as on the last day of the month to the cics, by 5th day of the next month

controls.control_objective: To ensure include all active accounts in the books of the ci and the accounts wherein relationship between the borrower and the ci has ended since the last repo
controls.control_description:
Full file for this purpose
shall include all active accounts in the books of the CI and the accounts wherein
relationship between the borrower and the CI has ended since the last reporting
reference date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include all active accounts in the books of the ci and the accounts wherein relationship between the borrower and the ci has ended since the last repo

controls.control_objective: To ensure only furnish 'incremental accounts' to cics
controls.control_description:
(iii) For other submissions during the month, i.e., credit information records as on 9th,
16th and 23rd day of the month, a CI shall only furnish 'incremental accounts' to CICs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to only furnish 'incremental accounts' to cics

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit such credit information to cics within four (4) calendar days from 1 substituted with effect from july 01, 2026, vide reserve bank of india (co
controls.control_description:
The CI shall submit such credit information to CICs within four (4) calendar days from
1 Substituted with effect from July 01, 2026, vide Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Credit Information Reporting) Amendment Directions, 2025 dated December 04, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit such credit information to cics within four (4) calendar days from 1 substituted with effect from july 01, 2026, vide reserve bank of india (co

controls.control_objective: To ensure include details in respect of the following accounts:
controls.control_description:
Incremental accounts for this purpose shall include details
in respect of the following accounts:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include details in respect of the following accounts:

controls.control_objective: To ensure include instances of repayment, change in outstanding balance, updates in demographic details, related party, guarantors, ownership of account, accoun
controls.control_description:
(c) Accounts where there is a change from the last reporting reference date
because of any action/ transaction initiated by the borrower, and the same shall
include instances of repayment, change in outstanding balance, updates in
demographic details, related party, guarantors, ownership of account, account
type;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include instances of repayment, change in outstanding balance, updates in demographic details, related party, guarantors, ownership of account, accoun

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to, inter alia, the following guidelines when reporting credit information in the ucrf: (1) in the commercial reporting segment, corporate iden
controls.control_description:
A CI shall adhere to, inter alia, the following guidelines when reporting credit
information in the UCRF:
(1) In the commercial reporting segment, corporate identification number (CIN) and
credit history of the directors of the company (based on DIN number) shall be
<image>
reported.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to adhere to, inter alia, the following guidelines when reporting credit information in the ucrf: (1) in the commercial reporting segment, corporate iden

controls.control_objective: To ensure report cases where compromise settlements have taken place and the reason for such compromise settlement, in the prescribed data formats to cics
controls.control_description:
(2) A CI shall report cases where compromise settlements have taken place and
the reason for such compromise settlement, in the prescribed data formats to CICs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report cases where compromise settlements have taken place and the reason for such compromise settlement, in the prescribed data formats to cics

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit data as it is, while qualitative information on what filters to apply based on amount and period would be done by the su and others who make us
controls.control_description:
(3) With respect to part instalment overdue, a CI shall submit data as it is, while
qualitative information on what filters to apply based on amount and period would be
done by the SU and others who make use of the data.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit data as it is, while qualitative information on what filters to apply based on amount and period would be done by the su and others who make us

controls.control_objective: To ensure use 'settled' status for denoting only specific situations where due to financial inability to repay as per original terms and conditions, either a pr
controls.control_description:
(4) A CI shall use 'settled' status for denoting only specific situations where due to
financial inability to repay as per original terms and conditions, either a principal or an
interest waiver or both is provided to the customer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use 'settled' status for denoting only specific situations where due to financial inability to repay as per original terms and conditions, either a pr

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported as 'settled' but as 'disputed'
controls.control_description:
Cases of wrong debits or contested charges shall not be reported
as 'settled' but as 'disputed'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported as 'settled' but as 'disputed'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported on a fortnightly basis to the cics by a ci which has been designated as the issuing and payment agent (ipa) for the particular cp issue
controls.control_description:
(5) The information on Commercial Papers (CPs) issued by the companies shall be
reported on a fortnightly basis to the CICs by a CI which has been designated as the
Issuing and Payment Agent (IPA) for the particular CP issue.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported on a fortnightly basis to the cics by a ci which has been designated as the issuing and payment agent (ipa) for the particular cp issue

controls.control_objective: To ensure report to the cics the details pertaining to the portion of the issue which is with them
controls.control_description:
If there are multiple
IPAs for a single CP issue, each IPA to such issue shall report to the CICs the details
pertaining to the portion of the issue which is with them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report to the cics the details pertaining to the portion of the issue which is with them

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported in the commercial data format in the fields as mentioned in annex ii
controls.control_description:
This information shall be
reported in the commercial data format in the fields as mentioned in Annex II.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported in the commercial data format in the fields as mentioned in annex ii

controls.control_objective: To ensure also report any default in the redemption of the relevant cp issue to the cics
controls.control_description:
The
IPA shall also report any default in the redemption of the relevant CP issue to the
CICs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also report any default in the redemption of the relevant cp issue to the cics

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported on a fortnightly basis to the cics by the lending ci (in the case of solo lenders) / consortium leader (in the case of consortium arrangem
controls.control_description:
(6) The information regarding Unhedged Foreign Currency Exposure (UFCE) of
individual borrowers shall be reported on a fortnightly basis to the CICs by the lending
CI (in the case of solo lenders) / consortium leader (in the case of consortium
arrangements) / largest lender (in the case of multiple lending arrangements).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported on a fortnightly basis to the cics by the lending ci (in the case of solo lenders) / consortium leader (in the case of consortium arrangem

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported under the suit-filed cases in the uniform credit reporting format, while reporting to the cics
controls.control_description:
(7) The cases admitted with National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) / National
Company Law Appellate Tribunal (NCLAT) under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy
Code, 2016 shall be reported under the suit-filed cases in the Uniform Credit
Reporting Format, while reporting to the CICs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported under the suit-filed cases in the uniform credit reporting format, while reporting to the cics

controls.control_objective: To ensure report the shg member level data to cics in the uniform credit reporting format (mfi) as mentioned in annex i
controls.control_description:
Data of Self Help Group (SHG) members
(1) A CI financing SHGs shall report the SHG member level data to CICs in
the Uniform Credit Reporting Format (MFI) as mentioned in Annex I.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report the shg member level data to cics in the uniform credit reporting format (mfi) as mentioned in annex i

controls.control_objective: To ensure collect information from all shg members in tables 1 and 2 and report it to the cics as set out in table 3
controls.control_description:
As indicated above, a CI shall collect
information from all SHG members in Tables 1 and 2 and report it to the CICs
as set out in Table 3.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to collect information from all shg members in tables 1 and 2 and report it to the cics as set out in table 3

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subsumed in form 3: uniform credit reporting format (mfi) of annex i for reporting to cics
controls.control_description:
The SHG member level data as mentioned in Table 3 shall
be subsumed in Form 3: Uniform Credit Reporting format (MFI) of Annex I for
reporting to CICs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subsumed in form 3: uniform credit reporting format (mfi) of annex i for reporting to cics

controls.control_objective: To ensure insert a suitable disclaimer in the records of the ci's borrowers to reflect non-updatability of the record due to closure of the ci in their cir
controls.control_description:
Reporting mechanism after cancellation of licence
(1) In case of cancellation of licence of a CI by RBI, either through voluntary
submission or supervisory action, CICs shall insert a suitable disclaimer in the
records of the CI's borrowers to reflect non-updatability of the record due to
closure of the CI in their CIR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to insert a suitable disclaimer in the records of the ci's borrowers to reflect non-updatability of the record due to closure of the ci in their cir

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement a credit information reporting mechanism subsequent to cancellation of licence as under
controls.control_description:
(2) In order to address the challenges in updating credit information of borrowers of
CI whose licence has been cancelled, CICs and CIs shall implement a credit
information reporting mechanism subsequent to cancellation of licence as under
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement a credit information reporting mechanism subsequent to cancellation of licence as under

controls.control_objective: To ensure be categorised 'credit institution' under section 2(f)(vii) of cicra
controls.control_description:
(i) A CI, whose licence has been cancelled by RBI shall be categorised 'Credit
Institution' under Section 2(f)(vii) of CICRA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be categorised 'credit institution' under section 2(f)(vii) of cicra

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to report credit information of the borrowers on- boarded and reported to cics prior to cancellation of their licence to all the four cics ti
controls.control_description:
(ii) Such a CI shall continue to report credit information of the borrowers on-
boarded and reported to CICs prior to cancellation of their licence to all the
four CICs till the loan lifecycle is completed or the credit institution is wound
up, whichever is earlier.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to continue to report credit information of the borrowers on- boarded and reported to cics prior to cancellation of their licence to all the four cics ti

controls.control_objective: To ensure have access to credit information reports pertaining to only those borrowers which were onboarded and reported to cics before the cancellation of thei
controls.control_description:
(iii) Such a CI shall have access to Credit Information Reports pertaining to only
those borrowers which were onboarded and reported to CICs before the
cancellation of their license.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have access to credit information reports pertaining to only those borrowers which were onboarded and reported to cics before the cancellation of thei

controls.control_objective: To ensure charge the annual and membership fees from such a ci
controls.control_description: (iv) CICs shall not charge the annual and membership fees from such a CI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to charge the annual and membership fees from such a ci

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be applicable to those entities whose licence has been cancelled by the reserve bank of india prior to issuance of these instructions
controls.control_description:
(v) These instructions shall also be applicable to those entities whose licence
has been cancelled by the Reserve Bank of India prior to issuance of these
instructions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be applicable to those entities whose licence has been cancelled by the reserve bank of india prior to issuance of these instructions

controls.control_objective: To ensure remain unchanged <image>
controls.control_description:
(vi) All other instructions regarding credit information reporting by CIs to CICs
shall remain unchanged
<image>
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to remain unchanged <image>

controls.control_objective: To ensure rectify the rejected data shared by cics and re-submit the same to cics before/ along with submission of data of subsequent reporting reference date
controls.control_description:
3A CI shall rectify the rejected data shared by CICs and re-submit the same to
CICs before/ along with submission of data of subsequent reporting reference
date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to rectify the rejected data shared by cics and re-submit the same to cics before/ along with submission of data of subsequent reporting reference date

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare and provide data quality index (dqi) for consumer, commercial and microfinance segments, as provided in reserve bank of india (credit informat
controls.control_description:
CICs shall prepare and provide Data Quality Index (DQI) for Consumer,
Commercial and Microfinance segments, as provided in Reserve Bank of India
(Credit Information Companies) Directions, 2025, for assessing the quality of
data submissions by CIs to CICs and improving the same over a period of time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare and provide data quality index (dqi) for consumer, commercial and microfinance segments, as provided in reserve bank of india (credit informat

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake half yearly review of the dqi for all segments to improve the quality of the data being submitted to cics
controls.control_description:
A CI shall undertake half yearly review of the DQI for all segments to improve
the quality of the data being submitted to CICs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake half yearly review of the dqi for all segments to improve the quality of the data being submitted to cics

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed before its top management by each ci for review within two months from the end of that half-year
controls.control_description:
A report consisting of issues
identified and corrective steps taken shall be placed before its top management
by each CI for review within two months from the end of that half-year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed before its top management by each ci for review within two months from the end of that half-year

controls.control_objective: To ensure abide by the time periods stipulated under cicra and the rules and regulations framed thereunder in respect of updation, alteration of credit informat
controls.control_description:
A CI shall abide by the time periods stipulated under CICRA and the Rules and
Regulations framed thereunder in respect of updation, alteration of credit
information, resolving disputes, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to abide by the time periods stipulated under cicra and the rules and regulations framed thereunder in respect of updation, alteration of credit informat

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adhered to
controls.control_description:
Procedure prescribed under Rules 20 and
21 of the CIC Rules, 2006 in this regard shall be adhered to.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be adhered to

controls.control_objective: To ensure be monitored and commented upon in the periodical reports/reviews put up to the board / committee of board on customer service
controls.control_description:
Deviations from
stipulated time limits shall be monitored and commented upon in the periodical
reports/reviews put up to the Board / Committee of Board on customer service.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be monitored and commented upon in the periodical reports/reviews put up to the board / committee of board on customer service

controls.control_objective: To ensure have arrangements in place to receive customer requests for rectification of data in cirs
controls.control_description:
A CI shall have arrangements in place to receive customer requests for
rectification of data in CIRs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have arrangements in place to receive customer requests for rectification of data in cirs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be corrected at the source by the ci that originally submitted the data
controls.control_description:
In order to maintain high data quality, all
erroneous data shall be corrected at the source by the CI that originally
submitted the data.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be corrected at the source by the ci that originally submitted the data

controls.control_objective: To ensure include in their loan policies / credit appraisal processes, suitable provisions for obtaining cirs from one or more cics so that the credit decisions
controls.control_description:
A CI shall include in their loan policies / credit appraisal processes, suitable
provisions for obtaining CIRs from one or more CICs so that the credit decisions
are based on credit information available in the system.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include in their loan policies / credit appraisal processes, suitable provisions for obtaining cirs from one or more cics so that the credit decisions

controls.control_objective: To ensure display, on its website, information in respect of the borrowers whose secured assets have been taken into possession by the cis under the sarfaesi ac
controls.control_description:
A CI which is a secured creditor as per the Securitisation and Reconstruction of
Financial Assets and Enforcement of Security Interest (SARFAESI) Act, 2002, shall
display, on its website, information in respect of the borrowers whose secured assets
have been taken into possession by the CIs under the SARFAESI Act, 2002 as per
the format given in Annex IV.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to display, on its website, information in respect of the borrowers whose secured assets have been taken into possession by the cis under the sarfaesi ac

controls.control_objective: To ensure be updated on monthly basis
controls.control_description:
The list consisting of this information shall be updated
on monthly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be updated on monthly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be disclosed on its website
controls.control_description:
(i) Secured assets possessed by a CI under the SARFAESI Act, 2002 on or
after September 25, 2023 should be disclosed on its website.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be disclosed on its website

controls.control_objective: To ensure be removed from the website in the event of the following circumstances:
controls.control_description:
(iii) The secured assets possessed by a CI shall be removed from the website
in the event of the following circumstances:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be removed from the website in the event of the following circumstances:

controls.control_objective: To ensure display information on secured assets possessed under section 13 (4) of the sarfaesi act, 2002
controls.control_description:
Accordingly, a CI shall display information on secured assets
possessed under Section 13 (4) of the SARFAESI Act, 2002.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to display information on secured assets possessed under section 13 (4) of the sarfaesi act, 2002

controls.control_objective: To ensure be displayed on the website of a ci
controls.control_description:
(v) Both movable and immovable secured assets possessed under Section
13 (4) of the SARFAESI Act, 2002, on which the information is already
published in the newspapers in terms of Rule 3 (1) or Rule 6 (2) of the
Security (Enforcement) Rules of 2002 in case of movable property, and
Rule 8 (2) ibid in case of immovable property, shall be displayed on the
website of a CI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be displayed on the website of a ci

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per definition provided under section 13 (9) (b) of the sarfaesi act, 2002 i
controls.control_description:
(vi) The 'outstanding amount' to be displayed on the website of a CI shall be
as per definition provided under Section 13 (9) (b) of the SARFAESI Act,
2002 i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per definition provided under section 13 (9) (b) of the sarfaesi act, 2002 i

controls.control_objective: To ensure include principal, interest and any other dues payable by the borrower to the secured creditor in respect of secured asset as per the books of account
controls.control_description:
it shall include principal, interest and any other dues payable by
the borrower to the secured creditor in respect of secured asset as per the
books of account of the secured creditor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include principal, interest and any other dues payable by the borrower to the secured creditor in respect of secured asset as per the books of account

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the information published in the newspapers in terms of rule 3 (1) or rule 6 (2) of the security (enforcement) rules of 2002 in case of mova
controls.control_description:
(vii) The 'outstanding balance', 'asset classification' and 'date of asset
classification' of the secured assets possessed under Section 13 (4) of the
SARFAESI Act, 2002, shall be as per the information published in the
newspapers in terms of Rule 3 (1) or Rule 6 (2) of the Security
(Enforcement) Rules of 2002 in case of movable property, and Rule 8 (2)
in case of immovable property.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per the information published in the newspapers in terms of rule 3 (1) or rule 6 (2) of the security (enforcement) rules of 2002 in case of mova

controls.control_objective: To ensure be limited to guarantors who have created a security interest in favour of the ci and whose assets are possessed under the act
controls.control_description:
Annex IV should be limited to guarantors who have created a security
interest in favour of the CI and whose assets are possessed under the Act.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be limited to guarantors who have created a security interest in favour of the ci and whose assets are possessed under the act

controls.control_objective: To ensure initiate sarfaesi proceedings, all consortium members are required to individually display on their website the details of assets taken into possessio
controls.control_description:
(xi) While the lead lender as per the consortium agreement may initiate
SARFAESI proceedings, all consortium members are required to
individually display on their website the details of assets taken into
possession, including outstanding amount and other details as per the
pari-passu charge and consortium agreement ensuring transparency.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to initiate sarfaesi proceedings, all consortium members are required to individually display on their website the details of assets taken into possessio

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure compliance with the applicable instructions on credit information reporting, as prescribed in the following directions/ circulars: (1) reserve
controls.control_description:
A CI shall ensure compliance with the applicable instructions on credit
information reporting, as prescribed in the following Directions/ Circulars:
(1) Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Credit Cards and Debit Cards:
Issuance and Conduct) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure compliance with the applicable instructions on credit information reporting, as prescribed in the following directions/ circulars: (1) reserve

controls.control_objective: To ensure be formed
controls.control_description:
In order to institutionalize a continuing mechanism for reviewing and making
changes where necessary in the data formats, a Technical Working Group
(TWG) shall be formed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be formed

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry out the following functions: (1) review the data reporting formats, at least once a year, and make recommendations
controls.control_description:
The TWG shall carry out the following functions:
(1) Review the data reporting formats, at least once a year, and make
recommendations, if any, to the Reserve Bank in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry out the following functions: (1) review the data reporting formats, at least once a year, and make recommendations

controls.control_objective: To ensure assign from time to time
controls.control_description:
(3) Any other matter relating to collection and dissemination of credit
information as the Reserve Bank may assign from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assign from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure comprise of representatives from public sector banks, private sector banks, foreign banks, primary (urban) cooperative banks (ucbs), regional rural ba
controls.control_description:
The TWG shall comprise of representatives from Public Sector Banks, Private
Sector Banks, Foreign Banks, Primary (Urban) Cooperative Banks (UCBs),
Regional Rural Banks (RRBs), All India Notified Financial Institutions (AIFIs),
Non-Banking Financial Companies (NBFCs), Housing Finance Companies
(HFCs), Asset Reconstruction Companies (ARCs) India Banks' Association
(IBA), Micro Finance Institutions Network (MFIN), Sa-Dhan and CICs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comprise of representatives from public sector banks, private sector banks, foreign banks, primary (urban) cooperative banks (ucbs), regional rural ba

controls.control_objective: To ensure be held at least once in a calendar year
controls.control_description: Meetings of the TWG shall be held at least once in a calendar year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be held at least once in a calendar year

controls.control_objective: To ensure act as convenor of the twg by rotation (for each calendar year), in alphabetical order of the name
controls.control_description:
The four
CICs shall act as convenor of the TWG by rotation (for each calendar year), in
alphabetical order of the name.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to act as convenor of the twg by rotation (for each calendar year), in alphabetical order of the name

controls.control_objective: To ensure be constituted to function as an advisory and collaborative body to offer expert insights and make recommendations on technical aspects of credit info
controls.control_description:
A Standing Sub-Group of TWG shall be constituted to function as an advisory
and collaborative body to offer expert insights and make recommendations on
technical aspects of credit information reporting.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be constituted to function as an advisory and collaborative body to offer expert insights and make recommendations on technical aspects of credit info

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required in the data reporting formats
controls.control_description:
This includes necessary modifications,
including changes in the IT systems, that may be required in the data reporting
formats.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required in the data reporting formats

controls.control_objective: To ensure work to support the broader twg to ensure a holistic approach to strengthening the credit information reporting ecosystem
controls.control_description:
The Sub-Group shall work to support the broader TWG to ensure a
holistic approach to strengthening the credit information reporting ecosystem.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to work to support the broader twg to ensure a holistic approach to strengthening the credit information reporting ecosystem

controls.control_objective: To ensure be selected by the convenor with prior approval of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Members of the Sub-Group shall be selected by the convenor with prior
approval of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be selected by the convenor with prior approval of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure nominate subject matter experts to its meetings
controls.control_description:
To enhance the overall expertise and
effectiveness of the discussions, members of the Sub-Group shall nominate
subject matter experts to its meetings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to nominate subject matter experts to its meetings

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet at least on a half yearly basis to discuss credit information reporting issues and seek potential resolutions
controls.control_description:
The Sub-Group of TWG shall meet at least on a half yearly basis to discuss
credit information reporting issues and seek potential resolutions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to meet at least on a half yearly basis to discuss credit information reporting issues and seek potential resolutions

controls.control_objective: To ensure also act as convenor of the sub-group in that particular calendar year
controls.control_description:
To ensure effective coordination, the CIC that assumes the role of TWG
convenor for a specific year shall also act as convenor of the Sub-Group in that
particular calendar year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also act as convenor of the sub-group in that particular calendar year

controls.control_objective: To ensure send the meeting agenda and notes at least fifteen (15) days before the
controls.control_description:
To ensure proper preparation and informed discussions, the convenor shall
send the meeting agenda and notes at least fifteen (15) days before the
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to send the meeting agenda and notes at least fifteen (15) days before the

controls.control_objective: To ensure send a note outlining the points of discussion and proposed solutions to the convenor
controls.control_description:
Additionally, if members desire to introduce a new issue or
item for discussion, they should send a note outlining the points of discussion
and proposed solutions to the convenor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to send a note outlining the points of discussion and proposed solutions to the convenor

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain specific timelines required for their implementation by cics and cis
controls.control_description:
Action points emanating from discussions of the Sub-Group shall contain
specific timelines required for their implementation by CICs and CIs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain specific timelines required for their implementation by cics and cis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be forwarded to the department of regulation, central office, reserve bank of india for perusal
controls.control_description:
Recommendations of the Sub-Group of TWG shall be forwarded to the
Department of Regulation, Central Office, Reserve Bank of India for perusal.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be forwarded to the department of regulation, central office, reserve bank of india for perusal

controls.control_objective: To ensure seek twg's opinion on these recommendations
controls.control_description:
If
required, RBI may seek TWG's opinion on these recommendations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to seek twg's opinion on these recommendations

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put in place by a ci: (1) updation of credit information with cics <image>
controls.control_description:
In order to strengthen and improve the efficacy of the grievance redress
mechanism and customer service provided by the CIs, the following measures
shall be put in place by a CI:
(1) Updation of credit information with CICs
<image>
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put in place by a ci: (1) updation of credit information with cics <image>

controls.control_objective: To ensure send alerts through sms / email to customers while submitting information to cics regarding default / days past due (dpd) in existing credit facilities
controls.control_description:
(i) A CI shall send alerts through SMS / email to customers while submitting
information to CICs regarding default / days past due (DPD) in existing
credit facilities, wherever the mobile number/email ID details are available.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to send alerts through sms / email to customers while submitting information to cics regarding default / days past due (dpd) in existing credit facilities

controls.control_objective: To ensure organize special awareness campaigns to sensitise its customers about benefits of submission of their mobile numbers / email ids
controls.control_description:
(iii) A CI shall organize special awareness campaigns to sensitise its
customers about benefits of submission of their mobile numbers / email
IDs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to organize special awareness campaigns to sensitise its customers about benefits of submission of their mobile numbers / email ids

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a dedicated nodal point / official of contact for cics for redress of customer grievances
controls.control_description:
(i) A CI shall have a dedicated nodal point / official of contact for CICs for
redress of customer grievances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a dedicated nodal point / official of contact for cics for redress of customer grievances

controls.control_objective: To ensure be furnished by the ci to cics
controls.control_description:
Details of the nodal point / official along
with email ID and telephone / mobile number shall be furnished by the CI to
CICs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be furnished by the ci to cics

controls.control_objective: To ensure inform cics of any changes in the nodal points / official within five calendar days of such a change
controls.control_description:
(ii) A CI shall inform CICs of any changes in the nodal points / official within
five calendar days of such a change.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inform cics of any changes in the nodal points / official within five calendar days of such a change

controls.control_objective: To ensure inform the customers the reasons for the rejection of their request for data correction
controls.control_description:
(i) A CI shall inform the customers the reasons for the rejection of their request
for data correction, if any, to enable such customers to better understand
the issues in the CIR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inform the customers the reasons for the rejection of their request for data correction

controls.control_objective: To ensure use the list of reasons for rejection of requests circulated by cics, while communicating the rejections of the request for data correction made by cu
controls.control_description:
(ii) A CI shall use the list of reasons for rejection of requests circulated by CICs,
while communicating the rejections of the request for data correction made
by customers / CICs during the grievance redress process.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use the list of reasons for rejection of requests circulated by cics, while communicating the rejections of the request for data correction made by cu

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake root cause analysis (rca) of the customer grievances at least on a half yearly basis
controls.control_description:
(i) A CI shall undertake Root Cause Analysis (RCA) of the customer
grievances at least on a half yearly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake root cause analysis (rca) of the customer grievances at least on a half yearly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure also use, inter alia, information on data rejected by the cics and dqi provided by cics as sources of information for carrying out rca
controls.control_description:
CIs shall also use, inter alia,
information on data rejected by the CICs and DQI provided by CICs as
sources of information for carrying out RCA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also use, inter alia, information on data rejected by the cics and dqi provided by cics as sources of information for carrying out rca

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed by the top management at least on an annual basis
controls.control_description:
(ii) The RCA shall be reviewed by the top management at least on an annual
basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed by the top management at least on an annual basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement the following compensation mechanism for delayed updation/ rectification of credit information: (1) complainants shall be entitled to a comp
controls.control_description:
A CI shall implement the following compensation mechanism for delayed
updation/ rectification of credit information:
(1) Complainants shall be entitled to a compensation of ₹100 per calendar day in
case their complaint is not resolved within a period of thirty calendar days from the
date of the initial filing of the complaint by the complainant with a CI / CIC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement the following compensation mechanism for delayed updation/ rectification of credit information: (1) complainants shall be entitled to a comp

controls.control_objective: To ensure be apportioned by the cis/cics on weighted average of the extent of delay by each cis/cics
controls.control_description:
Explanation:
Explanation: The delay of six days shall be apportioned by the CIs/CICs on
weighted average of the extent of delay by each CIs/CICs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be apportioned by the cis/cics on weighted average of the extent of delay by each cis/cics

controls.control_objective: To ensure be entitled for total compensation of ₹600
controls.control_description:
In the above case, the
overall delay is 6 days and therefore the complainant shall be entitled for total
compensation of ₹600.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be entitled for total compensation of ₹600

controls.control_objective: To ensure be apportioned on weighted average of the delay by each cis in relation to the overall delay of 32 days in this case
controls.control_description:
Therefore, the compensation
amount of ₹600 shall be apportioned on weighted average of the delay by each CIs
in relation to the overall delay of 32 days in this case.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be apportioned on weighted average of the delay by each cis in relation to the overall delay of 32 days in this case

controls.control_objective: To ensure be registered by the customer with the concerned cic
controls.control_description:
 Bank A = No compensation
 Bank B = (5*600)/32 = ₹93.75
 Bank C= (7*600)/32 = ₹131.25
 Bank D = (9*600)/32 = ₹168.75
 Bank E = (11*600)/32 = ₹206.25
 CIC = No compensation
Note: Where the grievance/ complaint involves inaccurate credit information of
more than one (1) CI, the complaint shall be registered by the customer with the
concerned CIC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be registered by the customer with the concerned cic

controls.control_objective: To ensure coordinate with all cis concerned, and furnish to the customer a comprehensive resolution of grievance
controls.control_description:
The CIC shall coordinate with all CIs concerned, and furnish to
the customer a comprehensive resolution of grievance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to coordinate with all cis concerned, and furnish to the customer a comprehensive resolution of grievance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be settled by conciliation or arbitration as provided in the arbitration and conciliation act, 1996
controls.control_description:
The Section 18 of CICRA, 2005 provides that for disputes arising
amongst, CICs, CIs, borrowers, and clients on matters relating to the
business of credit information and for which no remedy has been provided
under CICRA, 2005, such disputes shall be settled by conciliation or
arbitration as provided in the Arbitration and Conciliation Act, 1996.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be settled by conciliation or arbitration as provided in the arbitration and conciliation act, 1996

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the directions provided under the said scheme
controls.control_description:
A CI covered under the Reserve Bank - Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, 2021
(RBIOS, 2021) shall comply with the directions provided under the said
Scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the directions provided under the said scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the instructions issued vide master direction - reserve bank of india (internal <image> ombudsman) directions, 2023 dated december 29, 2023
controls.control_description:
A CI covered under the Internal Ombudsman framework shall adhere to the
instructions issued vide Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Internal
<image>
Ombudsman) Directions, 2023 dated December 29, 2023 (as amended from
time to time).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the instructions issued vide master direction - reserve bank of india (internal <image> ombudsman) directions, 2023 dated december 29, 2023

controls.control_objective: To ensure take into account the best practices as detailed below, while formulating or reviewing its policies and procedures under the cicra with the approval o
controls.control_description:
A CI shall take into account the best practices as detailed below, while
formulating or reviewing its policies and procedures under the CICRA with the
approval of their Board of Directors:
(1) Instances of non-updation of repayment information could be avoided by
centralising the issue of no objection certificates (NOCs) and providing information
to CICs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take into account the best practices as detailed below, while formulating or reviewing its policies and procedures under the cicra with the approval o

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given top priority especially in respect of complaints relating to updation / alteration of credit information
controls.control_description:
(2) Customer grievance redressal should be given top priority especially in respect
of complaints relating to updation / alteration of credit information.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given top priority especially in respect of complaints relating to updation / alteration of credit information

controls.control_objective: To ensure be integrated with the existing systems for grievance redressal
controls.control_description:
(3) Grievance redressal in respect of credit information should be integrated with the
existing systems for grievance redressal.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be integrated with the existing systems for grievance redressal

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be an integral part of customer service policy of a ci
controls.control_description:
Aspects relating to customer grievances
pertaining to credit information may also be an integral part of customer service
policy of a CI.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to also be an integral part of customer service policy of a ci

controls.control_objective: To ensure give full customer information to the cics
controls.control_description: (4) A CI shall give full customer information to the CICs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to give full customer information to the cics

controls.control_objective: To ensure be rejected just because they have no credit history
controls.control_description:
(5) First time borrowers' loan applications should not be rejected just because they
have no credit history.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be rejected just because they have no credit history

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a structured process of complaint redressal including the setting up of consumer protection committee of the board
controls.control_description:
A CI shall have a structured process
of complaint redressal including the setting up of Consumer Protection
Committee of the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a structured process of complaint redressal including the setting up of consumer protection committee of the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions and
guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to
remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: a) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: a) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of
any provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure fix a lower threshold for collecting the information/data indicated in this table and the next one
controls.control_description: With the approval of their boards, the banks with Gross NPA ratio exceeding 10% in the SHG loan segment may fix a lower threshold for collecting the information/data indicated in this Table and the next one.
